representation: affine cone with chart slice and deleted vertex
library: Matplotlib 3D because the cone, rays, and chart slice need a durable static view
inspection_target: Rays through the origin represent projective points; the red curve is the X0=1 affine chart.
validation_or_invariant: The sampled residual X0*X2 - X1^2 is zero up to floating tolerance.

representation: paired coordinate axes with reciprocal overlap arrows
library: Matplotlib because a labeled 2D construction diagram is enough and exports reliably
inspection_target: Each colored point in one chart lands at its reciprocal in the other chart; zero is excluded from the overlap.
validation_or_invariant: For sampled overlap points, x*y - 1 has zero maximum error.

representation: two implicit affine chart contours with matched overlap points
library: Matplotlib contours because the chart equations are planar implicit curves
inspection_target: Labels mark points transported from the Z=1 chart to the Y=1 chart by the projective coordinate change.
validation_or_invariant: Substituted overlap samples satisfy the Y=1 chart equation to numerical tolerance.

representation: 3D affine chart curve plus determinantal equation panel
library: Matplotlib 3D for a durable static curve; SymPy for exact rank-minor verification
inspection_target: The plotted curve is the X0=1 chart; the equation panel shows which minors vanish on every parametrized point.
validation_or_invariant: All three Hankel 2 x 2 minors vanish after substituting [U^3,U^2V,UV^2,V^3].

representation: affine chart surface z=u*v with two ruling families
library: Matplotlib 3D for a static ruled-surface inspection; SymPy checks the projective inverse formulas
inspection_target: Fixing u or fixing v gives straight lines on the surface; projection forgets z=u*v.
validation_or_invariant: The inverse formula lands on Q, and the two compositions agree up to projective scale on the open set.

representation: interactive Plotly 3D surface with projection fibers and ruling lines
library: Plotly because rotating the 3D ruled surface exposes which lines project to the affine base
inspection_target: Rotate the surface and compare vertical projection fibers with the two straight ruling families.
validation_or_invariant: The symbolic cell checks the projection inverse on the dense open set C != 0.

representation: proof-state dependency graph for rational maps, domains, open sets, and fields
library: NetworkX/Matplotlib-style graph because the concept is logical dependency rather than a metric drawing
inspection_target: Follow the arrows to see why dense open sets appear in the definition and proposition.
validation_or_invariant: Graph metrics record node and edge counts; symbolic quadric checks give a concrete birational example.

representation: numeric rank-one matrix heatmaps plus exact symbolic minor checks
library: Matplotlib for compact matrix inspection; SymPy for exact determinantal identities
inspection_target: Rows and columns are proportional because the displayed matrices are outer products.
validation_or_invariant: The Segre determinant and all Veronese 2 x 2 minors vanish symbolically.
